name: send_sms
description: Send an SMS text message via the TG200 cellular gateway. The message is delivered as a real cellular SMS. For long messages, the system automatically splits into multiple SMS segments (160 chars each, up to 10 segments). Use search_contacts first to find the recipient's number.

phone_number.description: Phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567) or 10-digit US format

message.description: The text message to send. Plain text only, no markdown. Max ~1500 characters (auto-split into 160-char segments).

from_number.description: Which of your own numbers/SIMs to send from. Omit to use the default gateway.

notes: Look up contact number with search_contacts first.
